locale.pickerSubtitle: You can change this any time in Settings.

hero.badge: Now in private beta — Singapore tradesmen
hero.title:
Keep every
dollar you earn.
Paid the same day.
hero.subtitle: ServiceSync is the zero-commission business-in-a-box for Singapore plumbers, electricians, aircon techs, and locksmiths. Invoice, collect PayNow, and handshake with clients on WhatsApp — from one mobile app that works off-grid.
hero.legalIntro: By creating an account, you agree to our
hero.legalTail: We are PDPA-compliant and never sell your data or your customers' contact details.
hero.valueHeading: What you get on day one

zeroCommission.title: Zero commission, ever
zeroCommission.body: You keep every dollar you earn. We charge a flat monthly subscription — no percentage cuts on jobs or invoices.

paynow.title: PayNow QR on every invoice
paynow.body: One tap to generate an SGQR. Customers scan, pay, and the invoice flips to paid automatically.

offline.title: Works when your signal doesn't
offline.body: Issue invoices in a basement car park or a lift lobby — it syncs the moment you reconnect.

singapore.title: Built in Singapore for Singapore trades
singapore.body: SGT scheduling, HDB addressing, Chinese/English WhatsApp handshakes — no US-first defaults to fight against.

signup.title: Join the beta
signup.subtitle: Takes under a minute. Phone number later.
signup.legalIntro: By signing up, you agree to our

login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Enter your email and password to sign in

wizard.title: Let's set you up
wizard.rerunSubtitle: We'll walk through every step. Your existing details stay until you change them.
wizard.intro: The more you fill in, the more clients trust you.

step1.heading: Which language would you like to use?
step1.helper: Tap one. You can change it later.
step1.footer: We'll save this to your profile and use it across the app.

step2.heading: Your name
step2.helper: This is what clients see on invoices.

step3.heading: Business number (optional)
step3.helper: UEN if you have one. Skip if not.

step4.heading: Where do you work?
step4.helper: We'll use this to sort your jobs.

step5.heading: Your base fee
step5.helper: In SGD. You can add more services later.

tutorial.tapHighlighted: Tap the highlighted button to continue

welcome.title: Quick tour
welcome.body: I'll show you 5 buttons. Tap each one as it lights up.

addService.title: Add a service
addService.body: Tap Services to list the work you do.

addClient.title: Add a client
addClient.body: Tap Clients to save names, numbers, notes.

collectPayment.title: Collect payment
collectPayment.body: Tap Collect Payment to make a PayNow invoice.

setupPayment.title: Setup payment
setupPayment.body: Before invoicing, you need your phone and address. Let's go to your profile.

profile.title: Your profile
profile.body: Tap your avatar to open your settings.

profileButton.title: Profile settings
profileButton.body: Tap Profile to go to your settings page.

editProfile.title: Edit details
editProfile.body: Tap Edit here to add your phone for PayNow and address for invoices.

workingHours.title: Set your hours
workingHours.body: Tap Working Hours to set your days off.

ready.title: You're ready!
ready.body: Replay this anytime from your profile.

checklist.title: Finish setting up
checklist.subtitle: Three quick steps to your first invoice.
checklist.rowServiceBody: The work you do and what you charge.
checklist.rowClientBody: Their number, address, and any notes.
checklist.rowPaynowBody: A 10-second preview of an invoice + QR.
checklist.completeBody: You can still replay the tour from your profile.

dashboard.emptyJobsBody: When a client books, you'll see it here.
dashboard.emptyClientsBody: Add your first client to send an invoice.
dashboard.emptyInvoicesBody: Create one from a job — it takes about 10 seconds.
dashboard.emptyServicesBody: Add the work you do and what you charge. We'll use it on every invoice.

paynowPreview.title: How PayNow works
paynowPreview.subtitle: Your client scans this QR. Money lands in your bank.
paynowPreview.sampleCaption: This is a demo — no money will move.
paynowPreview.legal: When the real QR is scanned and paid, we mark the invoice paid automatically.

profile.title: Your profile
profile.onboardingBody: Replay the quick tour, reopen the setup checklist, or change the language you use every day.
profile.languageBody: Pick the language that feels easiest on-site. We'll apply it across your app.
profile.rerunWizardBody: Change your name, language, base address, services, or PayNow. We'll take you through each step.
profile.replayTourToast: The quick tour will replay on your dashboard.
profile.checklistBody: Bring back the three setup steps on your dashboard if you hid them earlier.
profile.checklistToast: Your setup checklist is back on the dashboard.

help.title: Help videos
help.body: Short videos live here once we've confirmed the biggest friction points from beta calls.
help.emptyTitle: Videos publish after real beta calls
help.emptyBody: We'll only ship help videos once the topics come from real onboarding friction, not guesses.
help.paynowBody: See the exact taps for sending a simple invoice and showing the client the QR.
help.clientBody: A quick walk-through for saving a customer before you send the first invoice.
help.qrTitle: What to do if the QR won't work
help.qrBody: The short checklist to follow before you assume the payment failed.

errors.network: We can't reach our server. Check your connection and try again.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
